_note: Per-type speed ratios (fraction of expected_speed_ghs). Edit to tune for your rig. speed_history.json (actual measured GH/s per campaign) supersedes these once campaigns run. Run 'crackbaby benchmark --update-all' to auto-calibrate brute/mask/wordlist/rules entries AND measure the per-host stdin ceiling + combinator.bin strategy.
_prince_omen_note: prince/omen are pipe/generator-bound candidate FEED rates (cand/s ÷ 1e9), NOT GPU hash-rate fractions — seeds: omen-enum ~13M/s (omen 0.00019), pp64 ~53M/s (prince piped ≈ min(pp64, stdin ceiling) ≈ 0.0003). The live omen/prince ETA is computed data-driven from the measured stdin ceiling + generator rate and the per-phase feed (piped vs chunked); these entries are only fallback seeds.
